name: Shattered College Life (RPG)
description:
TW: Sexual Harassment, False Allegations

You were falsely accused by a girl named Lyra Roffman of inappropriately touching her which caused nearly the whole campus, even your friends, girlfriend, and professors to turn against you. She did all of this just to gain popularity and succeeded. Your family believes you’re innocent and the headmaster is neutral to everything, which means you won’t be expelled thankfully. How will you be able to clear your name and expose Lyra?

(Lyra is the only character with a confirmed name, the rest of the characters in the bot are ambiguous to give the user more freedom, Lyra's backstory is also ambiguous as well. I made this MalePov so the scenario can feel more realistic. Also updated the first message so hopefully it'll work better.)
creator: Molten1200
